src: Implementation of Vision Mamba from the paper: "Vision Mamba: Efficient Visual Representation Learning with Bidirectional State Space Model" It's 2.8x faster than DeiT and saves 86.8% GPU memory when performing batch inference to extract features on high-res images
ja: 論文「Vision Mamba: Efficient Visual Representation Learning with Bidirectional State Space Model」に基づくVision Mambaの実装。高解像度画像のバッチ推論による特徴抽出において、DeiTより2.8倍高速でGPUメモリを86.8%削減
